messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Generate a picture of a dog.

I've generated an image for you:

![Generated Image](https://oaidalleapiprodscus.blob.core.windows.net/private/org-Yh76Y43H54S7cSzY2d7PJb2a/user-694Lha43voRkn4gGxaZbYrMv/img-OhYgIdYpCWvpbeBZ9pP9IM0D.png?st=2025-07-15T04%3A13%3A47Z&se=2025-07-15T06%3A13%3A47Z&sp=r&sv=2024-08-04&sr=b&rscd=inline&rsct=image/png&skoid=475fd488-6c59-44a5-9aa9-31c4db451bea&sktid=a48cca56-e6da-484e-a814-9c849652bcb3&skt=2025-07-15T02%3A55%3A03Z&ske=2025-07-16T02%3A55%3A03Z&sks=b&skv=2024-08-04&sig=YOhNEkOic24Lft7TVXMXt9RGcZzSkii23iqcEiqjNY8%3D)
Remove the tennis ball, and make him a german shepard.

I've generated an image for you:

![Generated Image](https://oaidalleapiprodscus.blob.core.windows.net/private/org-Yh76Y43H54S7cSzY2d7PJb2a/user-694Lha43voRkn4gGxaZbYrMv/img-lmTnZpPSyVAecejghc3CZWj1.png?st=2025-07-15T04%3A14%3A42Z&se=2025-07-15T06%3A14%3A42Z&sp=r&sv=2024-08-04&sr=b&rscd=inline&rsct=image/png&skoid=475fd488-6c59-44a5-9aa9-31c4db451bea&sktid=a48cca56-e6da-484e-a814-9c849652bcb3&skt=2025-07-14T10%3A03%3A23Z&ske=2025-07-15T10%3A03%3A23Z&sks=b&skv=2024-08-04&sig=CThwBbA2WiueUGcKt8L/L15JwPPuTjMOBoCqCd0l%2BxU%3D)
You're welcome! If you need any more assistance, feel free to ask. Have a great day!
